Metadata.CommitMsg:
fix: make build step non-fatal for Unity projects

Changed the workflow to warn and skip instead of throwing when no
.sln/.csproj files are found. This is appropriate for Unity projects
where build files are typically generated locally by Unity/IDE, not
committed to the repo. Sonar analysis will proceed regardless.
Metadata.Author: Questionxble <christian.henken02@gmail.com>
